interface.longDescription:
Botlab places short phone calls on your behalf to confirm information (e.g., availability, hours, simple questions).
 Provide the phone number(s), language/region, and your goal. The app will return a concise outcome summary (and transcript when available).
 Use only when you have permission to contact the recipient. Not for emergency services or sensitive data collection.
defaultPrompt: Call +65 31****73 ask how to open new savings account
